'''Blethern Gas Industries''' was a major corporation that produced much of the specialized gases used in the manufacture of [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] and other weapons used commonly through out [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], they were on the list of legitimate targets for [[Rebel privateer]]s.

{{Company-stub}}
